summary: Runtime process running old code without confidence gate checks. Trades 241/243/244 opened from stale process predating MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE implementation.
core_question: What exactly was running when trades 241/243/244 opened?
answer: A bot_core process running code BEFORE the MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE gate was added to risk.py

trades_241_243_244.log_evidence: ZERO BRIDGE OPEN messages in logs for these trades
trades_241_243_244.gate_status: Should have been rejected but weren't

concurrent_gate_activity.00_00_16: check_entry_gates CALLED and REJECTED confidence=0.6286 with threshold 0.650
concurrent_gate_activity.00_01_14: model_bridge reports slug_already_open (tex-lad was opened somehow)
concurrent_gate_activity.pattern: Gate IS being called for other intents, but NOT for trades 241/243/244

current_source.bot_core_py: Apr 17 18:14 - Contains check_entry_gates call at line 632

pycache_timestamps.interpretation: Cache was recently rebuilt, but running process predates this

code_version_mismatch.runtime_divergence: Running code did not have confidence gate when trades 241/243/244 were created

startup_evidence.log_evidence: NO startup message at 19:40:43Z. Last logged startup: 2026-04-10T18:52:24Z
startup_evidence.gap: ~48 minutes between last logged restart and claimed restart
startup_evidence.trades_timing: 241/243/244 opened ~9+ hours AFTER last logged restart (18:52:24Z)

process_state_conclusion.most_likely: Process that opened trades 241/243/244 was running code from BEFORE the MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE implementation was added
evidence_chain: 1. Trades have source='model_bridge' but zero BRIDGE OPEN logs
2. Current source code has gate implementation and calls check_entry_gates()
3. check_entry_gates IS being called (00:00:16 rejection visible)
4. But low-conf trades still opened without rejection logs
5. No restart logged at claimed 19:40:43Z time
6. Process appears to have run from 18:52:24Z without restart

runtime_version_identity.what_was_running: Old bot_core.py process that predates check_entry_gates integration with bridge flow
runtime_version_identity.why_gate_didnt_work: The running process never loaded the patched code. Even though current source has gate calls, the running bytecode did not.
evidence: Zero BRIDGE OPEN logs for trades that show source='model_bridge'
check_entry_gates IS being called (00:00:16 rejection exists) but only for SOME intents
No consistent rejection logs for low-confidence signals
Process appears to have run 9+ hours without restarting

pyc_timestamps.interpretation: Recent cache rebuild, but doesn't prove what was running at trade times

bytecode_evidence.stale_process_indicator: Process that opened trades 241/243/244 was NOT using the Apr 18 00:10 bytecode - it was using OLD bytecode from BEFORE gate implementation

conclusion.mechanism: Bot process started before MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE was implemented, continued running through trade open times without restart, therefore never loaded the gate checks
conclusion.why_no_logs: Stale process code predates the BRIDGE OPEN and BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] log calls, so no rejection logs appear for these trades
conclusion.recommendation: Kill all bot_core processes and restart cleanly to ensure patched code is loaded
